Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "NEUTRALZONE-C000" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Neutral Zone.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which:
1. sets up the correct VICII settings, the necessary BASIC pointers. The BASIC start pointer ($2B/$2C) is set to $08AE to skip the loading of the game file from tape (which will already have been loaded when the dump is taken). 2. calls the subroutine at $3300 which displays the title screen (this was present in the original game, but wasn't called when game was first loaded). 3. waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. 4. executes the RUN command to start the game program.
Note: to dump, simply wait until the title screen is displayed after the loading screen, then dump with the monitor.
